inputs.label: Speed (m/s)
inputs.businessContext: Input speed in meters per second

inputs.label: Meters to Miles Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from meters to miles

inputs.label: Seconds to Hours Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from seconds to hours

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding output

formulas.speed_mph_rounded: Math.round(speed_ms * factor_m_to_mi * factor_s_to_h * Math.pow(10, decimal_places)) / Math.pow(10, decimal_places)
